chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-1783 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.8827/2023 3. For hearing of main case 22.09.2025 Ms. Saima Imdad, AAG --------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is almost two years ago. On the last date of hearing, learned counsel for the petitioner sought an adjournment to obtain appropriate instructions. In the last two years, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse almost two years, none present for the petitioner without any intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
